parameters.query:
SELECT 
  tp.id AS tracked_page_id,
  tp.url,
  tp.company_id,
  c.name AS company_name
FROM public.tracked_pages tp
JOIN public.companies c ON c.id = tp.company_id
WHERE tp.enabled = true
  AND tp.page_type = 'integrations'
ORDER BY tp.company_id;

SELECT distribution_tracker.upsert_snapshot(
  '{{ $json.company_id }}'::UUID,
  '{{ $json.tracked_page_id }}'::UUID,
  {{ $json.features.integration_count }},
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.integration_names }}::TEXT[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.features.integration_categories) }}'::JSONB,
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.marketplace_presence }}::TEXT[],
  ARRAY{{ $json.features.partner_mentions }}::TEXT[],
  {{ $json.features.has_public_api }},
  {{ $json.features.api_doc_url ? "'" + $json.features.api_doc_url + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.content_hash }}'
) AS snapshot_id;
